transcript: The series began in 1989 by introducing a young girl named Kim Mo Mai. She was a little girl with a special talent and confidence to perform in front of many people. Mo Mai had a big dream. She wanted to be an artist that everyone loved. Being on stage and hearing the crowd's applause made her really happy and excited. But as time passed and she grew up, even though Moay's skills improved, she had to give up on her dream because she thought she looked ugly. So eventually, Momay had to let go of her dream and became a regular office worker at 27 years old. However, one night while watching TV, she saw a performance by an artist that reignited her dream. From that night on, Momay found her dream again. she decided to use social media to show off her singing and dancing skills taking on the stage name masked girl momai had some amazing skills in a great body so she easily gained a bunch of fans but she was leading a bit of a double life by day she worked at an office but her co-workers hardly noticed her they judged people based on how they looked and would even say mean things to Momae. Even her best friend Sang-soon had it tough. They felt like the guys in the office were all acting creepy and treating the female employees badly. Sang-soon and Momae would often chat about their friend Ah-ri-um, who they thought was being a bit too flirty with the guys at work. Momae suddenly found herself having a crush on her boss, Mr. Park. He was good-looking and really smart, and Momay couldn't help but be intrigued. Mr. Park wasn't falling for Ah-Riam's beauty tricks, though. He'd always act like he didn't care when she tried to get close to him. Momay believed Mr. Park was a great office manager and a family man devoted to his wife. But when the evening came, Momae transformed into a sexy performer with a golden mask, attracting loads of loyal fans. She made sure to keep her real face hidden, adding a mysterious touch to her act. The next day, at a dinner with her colleagues from the office, Momae had another surprise. She saw Mr. Park turning down Arim's offer to pour him a drink. And one of Momi's bosses was talking about how awesome masked girl, who was now like a star on social media. This caught Momi off guard. She found out that someone at her workplace was actually a fan of her secret identity. Later, when they were heading home, Mr. Park and Momi ended up sharing a taxi since they were going the same way. During the ride, Momay overheard Mr. Park telling a little lie to his wife on the phone. He said he was alone, even though he was with Momay at the time. This made Momay feel both uncomfortable and even more interested in Mr. Park. Once she got home, she went live as usual and shared what happened with her fans. She talked about how she was puzzled by why her boss would lie to his wife about being alone when he was actually with her. Before long, some comments started popping up from her fans. Momai noticed a comment from someone called Handsome Before, who urged Masked Girl to forget about her boss and said that they truly loved Masked Girl. The next day, Sangsoon had something to share with Momai. She said that Mr. Park is quite a self-absorbed guy on social media. This news somehow made Mo-mi like Mr. Park even more. Mo-mi felt really pleased when she saw Mr. Park giving Ah-ri-um a scolding in front of everyone. When it was time for Mo-mi to head home, she told Ah-ri-um not to let Mr. Park's scolding get her down.. As Momai was leaving, she realized she'd left something at her desk. So she went back to grab it. But Momai ended up seeing Mr. Park sneaking back to his office, all hush-hush, to be with Arium. That was a hard moment for Momai, because she'd been keeping a big crush on Mr. Park all this time. Learning about the secret romance between Mr. Park and Arium broke Momay's heart. That night, Momay dealt with her heartbreak by having a drink alone. And in a bit of a tipsy state, she accidentally did a live stream while taking off her clothes. Unfortunately, that caused her mass girl account to get blocked that very night. The next morning, Momay woke up feeling really surprised by her own silly actions from the previous night. When she got to the office, she found herself getting really annoyed with Ah Riam. Finally, Mo Mai decided to spill the beans about the affair between Mr. Park and Ah Riam to their friends. She initially asked everyone to keep it a secret, but somehow the news spread throughout the office really quickly. After work, when Mo May got back home, she noticed Mr. Park looking sad and drunk, and he seemed like he might want to hurt himself. Momai decided to take him to his place, but instead of taking him home, she unknowingly led him to a motel. In their drunken state, Mr. Park and Momai ended up being in it that night. The next morning, when Mr. Park woke up, he just left without even saying goodbye to Momae, who was still fast asleep. After some time passed, Momae showed up at the office and got a shock when she heard that Mr. Park had actually quit. He decided to leave the company after their boss talked with him and Arium. This made Momae feel really bad about Mr. Park's decision, even though she didn't really want him to leave the company. On top of that, Momay was taken aback by an email from someone she didn't know. This email somehow found out that Momay was Masked Girl. She started feeling nervous because now someone knew her secret identity. As days went by, Momay started to suspect the people around her. When she got home, it was a bit comforting for her to see her loyal fans still supporting and cheering for her. But one of the fans who followed Masked Girl under the username Handsome before was actually Momai's colleague at the office, Jono Nam. Onam had been an introverted person since he was young, and he'd gone through a tough time because he was bullied by his friends. He also felt sad because of his weight and had often been the target of bullying. As time went on, Onam grew up as a quiet and solitary person. He would keep quiet whenever his mom, Kyungju, asked him about his school experiences. Kyungju, a single mother, was always proud of Onam's kindness and quiet nature. She wished for him to become a doctor when he grew up. though onam was smart he didn't manage to get into medical university still he graduated with good grades and easily found a job even as an adult onam remained quiet and lonely finding solace in his somewhat unusual fantasies apart from that omam got scared when looking into people's eyes while talking so he he would choose to focus on their hands instead. One day, he noticed Mo-Mi's hands at the office. He was taken aback because Mo-Mi's hands had the same birthmark and nail polish color as Masked Girl, who he admired. From that point on, O-Nam began to admire Mo-Mi both as Masked Girl during her broadcasts and as his co-worker sitting beside him. O-Nam was aware of Mo-ay's secret crush on their boss, Mr. Park. However, he believed that Mr. Park wasn't worthy of Momay's love. When Onam had chances to be alone with Momay, he felt scared and decided to keep his true feelings hidden. The night when Momay discovered the affair between Mr. Park and Arium, Onam was also in the room. Unlike Momay, who was devastated, Onam felt strangely happy, because he believed that Mo May finally saw Mr. Park and Arium. Onam was also in the room. Unlike Momai, who was devastated, Onam felt strangely happy, because he believed that Momai finally saw Mr. Park's true colors as a jerk who didn't deserve her. The next day, Onam was really sad when he saw Momai bringing a drunk Mr. Park to a motel for the night. This hurt Onam a lot, so he decided to email Momai, letting her know that he found out she was Mask Girl. One evening, Omi joined a chat with her loyal fans. She talked about feeling really down and wanting to give up. All her fans, including Onam, encouraged her. Then, unexpectedly, a fan named Handsome Monk asked Momai to meet up and go on a date. Onam seemed bothered by this. After a while, Momai agreed to meet Handsome to meet handsome monk however she intentionally wore glasses and a black mask to hide her face but eventually she gathered the courage to take off her mask and show her real face surprisingly handsome monk admired her real face and made momay feel at ease like she didn't need the mask anymore unfortunately it turned out that handsome monk was just playing with her feelings. He had made a bet with his friends and only wanted to have a physical encounter with Momai. In a different place, Onam was super angry when he read some posts from Handsome Monk, who had creepy intentions towards Momai. Onam was determined to rescue Momai from this shady guy. But sadly, Momai didn't pick up his calls because she didn't know him well. Meanwhile, Handsome Monk took Momai to a motel and tried to harass her. Momai fought back, but the guy got aggressive and hit her. Their struggle continued and Momai accidentally made Handsome Monk fall and hit his head on the sink. He passed out, leaving Momai in shock and panic. After a while, Momai read a worried message from Onam. He showed up soon after, as Momai called him for help. Onam told her to leave the room and that he would take responsibility for the situation. Just as Momai was about to do that, Handsome Monk suddenly woke up. Turns out he wasn't dead. This freaked Onam out, and he took drastic action. He ended up killing Handsome Monk, and tried to hide his body in a suitcase. The next day, Momi suddenly decides to quit her job without telling anyone, not even Song Soon. This really makes Onam sad and devastated. After that, she becomes unreachable on her phone. Onam then contacts the company's HR department to get Momi's address. He thinks about sending her some of her old stuff since she's no longer working. Later that night, Onam goes to Momi's place. However, her apartment looks deserted and empty. When Onam gets back home, he's surprised to see that Masked Girl's account is live, saying goodbye to her loyal fans. She dances seductively and bids them farewell. At the same time, Onam rushes back to Momi's apartment and convinces her to open the door. He steps inside her room and Momi tells him that she can't live with the guilt of a murder hanging over her. Momi then admitted that she knew Onam was the loyal fan named Handsome before. She felt really let down because Onam had been spying on her and causing her distress after discovering her secret identity. She saw Onam as just another guy who only cared about her looks and wanted her for her appearance. She couldn't believe Onam's feelings and laughed when he confessed his love. Momoi had decided to leave her past as Masked Girl behind and start Inu as a different person. Onam was disappointed with Momoi's choice since he didn't want her to erase him from her life. In a sudden turn of events, Onam pushed Momay onto the bed and expressed his love physically. But he was in for a shock when he saw Momay's face wrapped in bandages. She had undergone surgery. Momay quickly took charge and turned the tables on Onam, catching him off guard and eventually killing him that very night. The story shifts its focus to Onam's mom Kyungju. She's a single mom who left her husband because he had an affair and didn't support her during their three-year marriage. Kyungju is a really caring mom to her son. She's patient even as she watches Onam grow up as a quiet person who often comes home looking beat up, even though he never tells her what really happened. Kyungju works really hard and takes on any job to achieve her dream of opening a restaurant and supporting Onam. Cutting to the chase after Onam graduates from college and lands a job, he asks Kyungju to live close to his workplace. Kyungju initially hesitates since she wants to stay with Oh-nam, but she eventually agrees since Oh-nam has been living independently. However, this new arrangement strains their relationship. Whenever Kyung-ju visits Oh-nam, he's too caught up in his own busy life and doesn't seem interested in spending time with her. A few days later, Oh-nam stops answering Kyung-ju's calls, which worries her. She becomes anxious and contacts the police to check on Oh Nam. They enter Oh Nam's room and discover some strange things like a bad smell and a life-sized sex doll. But the real shot comes when they find a human body in his refrigerator. The news spreads, and people start thinking that Oh Nam might be a killer who escaped. After some time, Kyung Joo feels relieved when she learns that the body parts aren't Oh Nam's, but she can't believe that her son is being suspected of such horrifying things. Two detectives in charge of the case look into Oh Nam's workplace and find out that he recently visited HRD, asking for Mo Mi's address. They, along with Kyung Ju, investigate Mo Mi's old place and learn that she had plastic surgery before moving out. The detectives start thinking that Momae and Onam might have left together. But Kim Joo refuses to believe that her kind-hearted son could be involved in such terrible acts of perversion and murder. Kim Joo takes matters into her own hands and decides to investigate Kim Momae, who is suspected of being Onam's girlfriend. She enlists the help of a tech expert to unlock her son's computer, which has Momae's photo as the wallpaper. Even though she's not tech-savvy, Kyungju learns how to use a computer in her old age to find her son. She starts researching about Momae and is determined to understand complex investigations just to locate Onam. Kyungju is even ready to sell her restaurant and use her savings if it helps find Onam. Kyungju gets in touch with the leader of the Masked Girl fan community online, a person named Teddy. Teddy helps Kyungju, and they discover a woman who looks and dances like Momai, but with fake breasts. Teddy points out that not many people in South Korea have breasts like Momi's. At night, Kyungju misses Onam greatly and has nightmares about him. The next day, the police find Onam's mutilated body, which deeply saddens Kyungju. Following this gruesome discovery, the police start suspecting Momi in both cases of male mutilation. Meanwhile, Kyungju visits Momi's birth mother, hoping for some answers. However, Mo-mi's biological mother denies her and claims to have cut ties with Mo-mi long ago. Despite this, Kyung-ju keeps looking into the woman who resembles Mo-mi. She traces her to her workplace, only to find out that she's moved on to a new job through a distribution agency. Kyung-ju quietly observes the woman all the time, while having obtained an illegal gun for her revenge plan. She even becomes a part-time taxi driver to get closer to her target. Eventually, she waits outside the woman's workplace, and when she gets into Kyung-Joo's taxi, Kyung-Joo tries to engage her in conversation before using an electroshock device to knock her unconscious. Kyung-Joo takes the woman to an old building situated in a forest, making sure no one could hear of her even if she screamed. The woman pleads for her life, begging not to be killed. Driven by revenge, Kyungju points her rifle at the woman. She questions the woman about why Momai killed Oman, showing her a photo of the masked girl as evidence. Kyungju insists that the woman is the masked girl, pointing out the moon and star necklace as proof. When the woman sees the masked girl's photos, she bursts into laughter, aware of who the real masked girl is. She implores Kyungju not to kill her, promising to help her locate the genuine masked girl. The story shifts to Chundi, the woman caught by Kyung-ju, and not the real masked girl. Chun-hee has her own background. Back in her school days, she was different from her friends and had a crush on a classmate named Boo-young, who was about to debut as an idol. Chun-hee found Boo-young very charming, and when he and his friends tried to buy alcohol and cigarettes at a young age, they convinced her, as she was working at a convenience store. She got closer to Bu Young, but he saw her as his source of money, not a true friend. Despite that, Chun-Hee's feelings for Bu Young grew stronger, and she couldn't say no when he asked for help. Eventually, Bu Young's true colors were revealed, and he discarded her after this debut. Feeling used and hurt, Chun-Hee retaliated by exposing his past mistakes, leading to his agency dropping him. Thank you for watching. were revealed, and he discarded her after this debut. Feeling used and hurt, Chun-Hee retaliated by exposing his past mistakes, leading to his agency dropping him. She decided to transform herself with her savings, aiming to become beautiful and sought after. Chun-Hee worked hard to make ends meet, even taking extra shifts. One day, Chun-Hee unexpectedly encounters Bu-Young again. But her desire for revenge fades when she sees that he's now homeless and struggling. Despite her past with Boo-Young, Chun-Hee takes him back into her life. Love can sometimes make people do foolish things, and that's what happens with Chun-Hee. Following this, Chun-Hee starts working at a club, becoming the prima donna. Soon, she crosses paths with Mo-Ma, a new singer introduced at the club. club moma's presence begins to attract more customers leaving chun he feeling jealous this jealousy leads to a fight between them over customers in the midst of their struggle momi's moon star necklace falls and is picked up by chun he after listening to chun he's story keongju decides to trust her and asks for her assistance in finding Mo-Mae. Kyung-Joo instructs Chun-Hee to share any information she has about Mo-Mae. After their conversation, Chun-Hee secretly heads to a rundown apartment. Unexpectedly, that rundown place is where Mo-Mae lives. Mo-Mae looks worn out and exhausted, while Chun-Hee appears deeply concerned about Mo-Mae's well-being. Despite their apparent conflict, Chun-hee and Mo-mi are actually close friends. Their bond started when they met at the club, sharing similar beauty and talent in singing and dancing. Chun-hee concocted a fabricated story to Kyung-ju, intending to shield Mo-mi from Kyung-ju's harmful intentions. Aware of Mo-mi's vulnerable situation, Chun-hee is determined to assist her in escaping her troubles. Mo-mi, being estranged from her mother, avoids returning home due to their strained relationship. However, an unexpected turn occurs when a high school student snaps a photo of Chun-hee leaving Mo-mi's place that day. Upon their return, Chun-hee and Bu-young engage in a heated argument, due to Chun-hee's increasing inability to tolerate him. She requests Bu-young to leave her house, but he refuses and resorts to violence. Bu-young, aware that Chun-hee had once posted damaging content about him, seeks to take responsibility for his circumstances. Despite the confrontation, he intentionally avoids hitting her face, as he still needs her to work for him. In a different place, it turns out the high school student who has been trailing Chun-Hee and Mo-Mae is none other than the leader of the Masked Girl fan club, known as Teddy. Mo-Mae is taken aback when someone recognizes her as Masked Girl. Upon reaching their destination, Mo-Mae grows concerned upon seeing Chun-Hee's state, prompting them to decide to stick together. Unfortunately, while Chun-Hee sneaks home to retrieve money and belongings, along with her pet dog, Bu-Young wakes up and assaults her mercilessly. Mo-Mei intervenes to save Chun-Hee from Bu-Young's brutality. As they faced a life-threatening situation, they make a tough choice to kill Bu-Young self-defense and protect themselves. They hide Boo Young's body in a suitcase and drive away. Unbeknownst to them, Kyung Joo has been observing their actions and realizes that Chun Hee and Mo Mai are collaborating to deceive her. Meanwhile, Teddy shares his latest findings about the masked girl, indicating that she has ties to Mo Mai and Chun Hee. During their journey their journey, Momay reveals to Chun-Yi that she is pregnant with the child conceived during her encounter with O-Mam. Despite any concerns about the child's appearance, Momay is determined to raise her baby with love and pride, valuing the child's inner beauty above all else. Momay didn't want to be a mom like her own mother, who never called her beautiful. That hurt has stayed with her until now. When Momai and Chun-hee arrived at a river, planning to dispose of the suitcase with Bu-young's body, they were caught off guard as Kyung-ju suddenly appeared, shouting at them and aiming a shotgun. Chun-hee stepped in to shield Momai, claiming to be the masked girl Kyung-ju was after. But Momai also went to protect Chun-hee, insisting she was the real Momai. Kyungju was determined to harm them both, ignoring their explanations. A struggle broke out, and Kyungju shot Chunhee in the stomach. Despite her wound, Chunhee fought fiercely against Kyungju's attempt to harm Momai, eventually causing Kyungju to pass out. Momai was heartbroken as she held Chunhee in her arms, mourning her friend's passing. Soon after, Mo-mi sank Kyung-ju's taxi into a river, with both Kyung-ju and Bu-young's bodies inside. After committing this act, she went into hiding and gave birth to her baby. Mo-mi entrusted her baby to her mother, Mo-ryeong, despite Mo-ryeong's initial reluctance. Mo-ryeong couldn't resist the innocence of the baby. And after a year of hiding, Moe Mai surrendered herself to the police. In 2012, she was sentenced to life in prison after confessing to all the crimes she had committed. Long story short, Moe Mai's daughter, named Kim Memo, grew up. Maimo's name was quite similar to her mother's. Just like her mom, Memo loved dressing dressing up, which often got her scolded by her grandmother, Mo-ryeong. As Man-mo started elementary school, some kids' parents forbade them from being friends with her because of her mom's past as the masked girl and a murderer. Innocent Man-mo began searching for information about the masked girl and her identity, copying funny things from the internet about her mom, unaware of her mother's actions. This behavior scared Moe Young, who would punish Memo despite her young age. One day, Memo stood up against a friend who was teasing her, resulting in her hitting the friend. Unfortunately, this led to Memo being expelled from school. Tearfully, she bid farewell to the kind grandmother, who sold to Pocky in front of the school. Long story short, Maimo changes schools a lot, but finally finds a new junior high where nobody knows her past. She feels at ease being quiet and keeping to herself. She befriends Yi Jun, another outcast, who eventually becomes her best friend. Despite starting off distant, they become really close. Yi Jun even lies about his family problems to ensure Maimo's support. One day, Memo opens up to Yi Jun about her convict mother, strengthening their bond. Yi Jun sticks by her side despite her tough life. He even suggests selling his belongings to help Memo and learns about Topaki's grandmother who always helped her and loved her. Memo also has an idea to borrow some money from the grandmother. The following day, Lee Jun sells his collection of idol photos to younger kids and faces bullying from his friends once again. He's tempted to reveal Memo's real mother to scare them, but he chooses not to. Meanwhile, Memo is caught stealing a laptop from a cafe, causing her grandmother Mo Young to feel angry and embarrassed. Memo, who has long felt disliked by Mo Young, decides to leave home. She plans to spend the night at Yi Jun's, but he makes up an excuse about his dad being angry. So, Man Mo ends up sleeping at school. The next day, Man Mo is bullied at school when her friends discover her connection to the masked girl. Feeling overwhelmed, she skips both school and going home. Yijun worries and searches for her. However, Memo secretly sees Yijun getting along well with her family. Memo feels betrayed, accusing Yijun of betraying her by sharing her secret. He denies it, which angers Memo even more, leading her to act rudely and eventually walk away from their friendship. Meanwhile, from a distance, Topaki's grandmother watches the fight between Minmo and Yi Jun with a strange sense of happiness. The story then jumps back to the year 2012, when Momi began her life sentence in prison. She finds a kind fellow prisoner who doesn't judge her for her past. Moreover, Momi becomes the focus of attention among other inmates due to her beauty and her willingness to give advice on plastic surgery. This earns her respect from some, but not from Onsik, a formidable inmate who dislikes her. Onsik sees Momi's beauty as a threat and even suspects her of being involved with her husband. Momai endures bullying from Onsik and her group. However, Momi doesn't back down and fights back Un-sik and her group, often ending up in solitary confinement. Yet, every time she's released, she continues to stand up to them. Eventually, Mun-sik seeks a truce to avoid further confrontations with Mo-mae. After spending 11 years in prison, Mo-mae's peaceful life is disrupted by a letter from Kyung-ju. She's anxious because Kyung-ju threatens to harm Mi-mo, her daughter. To safeguard Mi-mo, Mo-mi decides to escape from prison, even though it's a challenging task. She plans her escape by crafting a rope from the cloth she uses for sewing every day. Her cellmate helps by distracting the guards, allowing Mo-mi to sneak away unnoticed. Unfortunately, her escape attempt goes awry when the rope she's using to scale the wall tears suddenly. The guards catch her in the act. Once the guards discovered Momai's escape attempt, the religious chief warden took action. Momai was put in isolation for over a month. Along with this, the chief warden gave her a Bible, hoping she'd reflect on her actions and find redemption. During her time in solitary confinement with the Bible, Momay underwent a surprising transformation. She became deeply religious. In a turn of events, Momay found herself agreeing to be a kidney donor for Princess Munsik. This act of generosity earned Momay Munsik's immense gratitude. The princess pledged to support Momay and fulfill her wishes in return. On a regular day at the prison, they organized self-improvement training with volunteers from the outside. This event led to Momae and Kyungju crossing paths again. At first, Momae didn't recognize Kyungju due to her changed appearance from plastic surgery, done as part of her revenge against Momae. Kyungju recounted that Momae survived her suicide attempt and expressed how her thirst for revenge grew even stronger after that. With a new face and the knowledge that Momai was in prison, Kyungju devised a plan to get close to Momi's daughter, Memo, who lived with Moe Young. Kyungju approached little Memo and portrayed herself as kind and caring. She played the role of a loving grandmother in Maimo's eyes. However, behind this facade, Kyungju secretly revealed Maimo's mother's past to the mothers of Maimo's friends, causing Maimo to be ostracized. She continued this manipulation when Maimo changed schools, making sure Maimo was bullied once more. After hearing Kyungju's stories, Maimo became emotional and tried to talk to her. But Kyungju faked an attack from Momai, We'll be right back. Maimo was bullied once more. After hearing Kumju's stories, Memo became emotional and tried to talk to her. But Kumju faked an attack for Momai, leading to Momai being punished again with solitary confinement. Leaving the prison, Kumju felt a sense of satisfaction, believing she had taken her revenge. Unbeknownst to Momai, Kumju had been looking after Memo like a granddaughter in a secluded mountain house. Despite her initial intentions to kidnap her, Kyungju discovered that Memo preferred to live with her, seeing her as a grandmother figure. Memo made the bold choice to say farewell to her biological grandmother, Moe Young, and turn off her phone, leaving Moe Young worried and reporting Maemo's disappearance to the police. On another side of the story, Won-sik's assistance to Mo Mai is nothing more than a ruse. She's only interested in Mo Mi, as a potential kidney donor for her daughter. Won-sik even went as far as creating a fake photo of Memo, handing it to Mo Mai to keep her from worrying. Mo Mai, deeply concerned for her daughter, approached Won-sik to gather information about both her daughter and mother. Wonseok managed to obtain Momae's mother's contact number, leading Momae to make immediate contact. Sadly, her mother was still unwilling to share any details about Memo. Meanwhile, Kyungju was preparing to exact revenge on Memo by causing her harm. However, the very night, Kim Ju's stance softened a bit when Memo surprised her with a birthday celebration. Back in prison, Momae found it impossible to sleep that night. Her motherly instincts told her that Memo might be in danger. The following day, Momae was scheduled for a kidney donor surgery at the hospital. Seeing an opportunity as the police's guard lowered, Mo Mai wasted no time in attempting an escape. Driven by desperation and determination to find Memo, Mo Mai jumped from a second-floor window and managed to flee. She then commandeered a patient's car parked in front of the hospital. In different place, Kyung Joo cleverly slips sleeping pills into Memo's food. Oblivious to any suspicion, Memo happily gobbles up the meal. Memo is even excited about the prospect of finding a job soon, so she can buy nice things for Kyungju as a gesture of kindness. Meanwhile, Moyoung becomes increasingly suspicious about the saleswoman of the teppoki Maemo mentioned and the call she received from her. She takes it upon herself to track down the address of this Topoki seller's grandmother. Upon obtaining the address, Mo Young rushes to the location in haste. Surprisingly, Yi Jun also arrives, driven by concern for Ma Mo. Yi Jun has already figured out that the Topoki seller's grandmother, also known as Kum Ju, is the one who spread rumors about Ma Mo and the masked girl among her friends. While on her way to Kyungju's address, Mo Young receives a call from Mo Mai, who informs her about Kyungju's revenge plot against them. Upon hearing this, Mo Mai shares Kyungju's address with Mo Young and both hurry to the scene. However, Mo Young eventually decides to leave Yi Jun on the side of the road, fearing for her safety. Unexpectedly, Yi Jun summons the courage to continue searching for Maimo with the money she has. Thanks for watching! to leave Yi Jun on the side of the road, fearing for her safety. Unexpectedly, Yi Jun summons the courage to continue searching for Mai Mo with the money she has. In a different place, Mo Mi's car suddenly breaks down due to running out of gas. She attempts to hitch a ride from passing vehicles until a kind woman offers her a lift. The woman sympathizes with Mo Mai, who confesses about the abuse she faced from her husband. However, during the ride, a radio broadcast discusses the escape of a prisoner known as the Mask Girl. The woman driving becomes fearful, causing Mo Med to request to be dropped off in the middle of the road. Mo Mei continues her journey on foot from there. Meanwhile, Kyung Joo, who is holding Memo, encounters a small problem as she struggles with operating the newly purchased camcorder. She plans to show moment footage of Mimo's suffering later. Memo, who wakes up during this time, pleads with Kyungju to let her go. Unbeknownst to Memo, Kyungju harbors intense hatred towards her. Despite Mimo feeling cold, Kyungju tucks her in. Kyungju becomes puzzled when the doorbell rings unexpectedly. To her surprise, a police officer arrives, looking for a middle school boy who has reportedly been held captive based on a tip. After a thorough search of Kyung-Joo's house, the police find nothing and depart. The police officer hears a strange noise from inside the house, but receives an emergency call from the station instructing all officers to search for the masked girl. As the police officer leaves, Kyung-Joo resumes her revenge plan and attempts to kill Ma-Mo by burning mosquito coils to cause poisoning. Fortunately, Mo-Young arrives just in time and bravely tries to rescue Ma-Mo. She fiercely confronts Kyung-Joo and puts up a strong fight. Soon after, Yi-joon also joins in to save Maimo. Inside the tunnel where Maimo is being held captive, Yi-joon apologizes to Maimo and sets her free. Meanwhile, up in the tunnel, Mo-young sustains multiple stab wounds while protecting Maimo from Kyung-joo. Shortly, Mo-ma arrives and surprises Kyung-joo with a hit from behind. Mo- Mo Young instructs Mo Mai to check on Mai Mo's condition in the tunnel. Mo Mai enters the tunnel to rescue Min Mo and Yi Jun, but Kyung Ju regains consciousness and confronts them with a gun. Mo Mai manages to disarm Kyung Ju and urges Min Mo and Yi Jun to escape. Once they are outside the tunnel, Min Mo feels a heavy sense of sadness and guilt as she witnesses Momyeong's severe injuries and eventual passing. Inside the tunnel, the confrontation between Momae and Kyungju reaches its climax, resulting in Momae's victory as Kyungju faints once again after their intense duel. Momae leads Memo and Heejun out of the tunnel. However, their escape is interrupted as several policemen surround the area and demand Momae's surrender. Unexpectedly, Kumju re-emerges, aiming a shotgun at Momae and Memo. Just then, the police take action and shoot Kumju in the head after he shoots Momae in the back. Kumju dies instantly in front of his own house. Meanwhile, Mo Mi is taken into custody by the police. The story wraps up by revealing Maimo's current life on her own. Thankfully, Hee Joon's parents step in to become Maimo's guardians. As time passes, Maimo starts to lead a peaceful life. Whenever she's longing for her mom, she watches her mom's childhood videos. Maimo takes great pride in her mom's strong self-assurance and impressive talents, despite not fitting society's standards of beauty. Thank you for watching. watches her mom's childhood videos memo takes great pride in her mom's strong self-assurance and impressive talents despite not fitting society's standards of beauty the important lesson from this story is that we shouldn't judge people just by how they look because there might be tough things they're dealing with that we don't know about being good friends and staying loyal can help us overcome difficulties and when we're true to ourselves, we can discover happiness and inner peace.

timestamps.text: The series began in 1989 by introducing a young girl named Kim Mo Mai. She was a little girl with
a special talent and confidence to perform in front of many people. Mo Mai had a big dream.
She wanted to be an artist that everyone loved. Being on stage and hearing the crowd's applause

made her really happy and excited. But as time passed and she grew up, even though Moay's skills improved, she had to give up on her dream because she thought she looked ugly. So eventually, Momay had to let go of her dream and became a regular office worker at 27 years old. However, one night while watching TV, she saw a performance by an artist that reignited her dream. From that night on, Momay found her dream again. she decided to use social media to show off her singing and dancing skills taking on the stage name masked girl momai had some amazing skills in a great body so she easily gained a bunch of fans but she was leading a bit of a double life by day she worked at an office but her co-workers hardly noticed her they judged people based on how they looked and would even say mean things to Momae. Even her best friend Sang-soon had it tough. They felt like the guys in the office were all acting creepy and treating the female employees badly. Sang-soon and Momae would often chat about their friend Ah-ri-um, who they thought was being a bit too flirty with the guys at work. Momae suddenly found herself having a crush on her boss, Mr. Park. He was good-looking and really smart, and Momay couldn't help but be intrigued. Mr. Park wasn't falling for Ah-Riam's beauty tricks, though. He'd always act like he didn't care when she tried to get close to him. Momay believed Mr. Park was a great office manager and a family man devoted to his wife. But when the evening came, Momae transformed into a sexy performer with a golden mask, attracting loads of loyal fans. She made sure to keep her real face hidden, adding a mysterious touch to her act. The next day, at a dinner with her colleagues from the office, Momae had another surprise. She saw Mr. Park turning down Arim's offer to pour him a drink. And one of Momi's bosses was talking about how awesome masked girl, who was now like a star on social media. This caught Momi off guard. She found out that someone at her workplace was actually a fan of her secret identity. Later, when they were heading home, Mr. Park and Momi ended up sharing a taxi since they were going the same way. During the ride, Momay overheard Mr. Park telling a little lie to his wife on the phone. He said he was alone, even though he was with Momay at the time. This made Momay feel both uncomfortable and even more interested in Mr. Park. Once she got home, she went live as usual and shared what happened with her fans. She talked about how she was puzzled by why her boss would lie to his wife about being alone when he was actually with her. Before long, some comments started popping up from her fans. Momai noticed a comment from someone called Handsome Before, who urged Masked Girl to forget about her boss and said that they truly loved Masked Girl. The next day, Sangsoon had something to share with Momai. She said that Mr. Park is quite a self-absorbed guy on social media. This news somehow made Mo-mi like Mr. Park even more. Mo-mi felt really pleased when she saw Mr. Park giving Ah-ri-um a scolding in front of everyone. When it was time for Mo-mi to head home, she told Ah-ri-um not to let Mr. Park's scolding get her down.. As Momai was leaving, she realized she'd left something at her desk. So she went back to grab it. But Momai ended up seeing Mr. Park sneaking back to his office, all hush-hush, to be with Arium. That was a hard moment for Momai, because she'd been keeping a big crush on Mr. Park all this time. Learning about the secret romance between Mr. Park and Arium broke Momay's heart. That night, Momay dealt with her heartbreak by having a drink alone. And in a bit of a tipsy state, she accidentally did a live stream while taking off her clothes. Unfortunately, that caused her mass girl account to get blocked that very night. The next morning, Momay woke up feeling really surprised by her own silly actions from the previous night. When she got to the office, she found herself getting really annoyed with Ah Riam. Finally, Mo Mai decided to spill the beans about the affair between Mr. Park and Ah Riam to their friends. She initially asked everyone to keep it a secret, but somehow the news spread throughout the office really quickly. After work, when Mo May got back home, she noticed Mr. Park looking sad and drunk, and he seemed like he might want to hurt himself. Momai decided to take him to his place, but instead of taking him home, she unknowingly led him to a motel. In their drunken state, Mr. Park and Momai ended up being in it that night. The next morning, when Mr. Park woke up, he just left without even saying goodbye to Momae, who was still fast asleep. After some time passed, Momae showed up at the office and got a shock when she heard that Mr. Park had actually quit. He decided to leave the company after their boss talked with him and Arium. This made Momae feel really bad about Mr. Park's decision, even though she didn't really want him to leave the company. On top of that, Momay was taken aback by an email from someone she didn't know. This email somehow found out that Momay was Masked Girl. She started feeling nervous because now someone knew her secret identity. As days went by, Momay started to suspect the people around her. When she got home, it was a bit comforting for her to see her loyal fans still supporting and cheering for her. But one of the fans who followed Masked Girl under the username Handsome before was actually Momai's colleague at the office, Jono Nam. Onam had been an introverted person since he was young, and he'd gone through a tough time because he was bullied by his friends. He also felt sad because of his weight and had often been the target of bullying. As time went on, Onam grew up as a quiet and solitary person. He would keep quiet whenever his mom, Kyungju, asked him about his school experiences. Kyungju, a single mother, was always proud of Onam's kindness and quiet nature. She wished for him to become a doctor when he grew up. though onam was smart he didn't manage to get into medical university still he graduated with good grades and easily found a job even as an adult onam remained quiet and lonely finding solace in his somewhat unusual fantasies apart from that omam got scared when looking into people's eyes while talking so he he would choose to focus on their hands instead. One day, he noticed Mo-Mi's hands at the office. He was taken aback because Mo-Mi's hands had the same birthmark and nail polish color as Masked Girl, who he admired. From that point on, O-Nam began to admire Mo-Mi both as Masked Girl during her broadcasts and as his co-worker sitting beside him. O-Nam was aware of Mo-ay's secret crush on their boss, Mr. Park. However, he believed that Mr. Park wasn't worthy of Momay's love. When Onam had chances to be alone with Momay, he felt scared and decided to keep his true feelings hidden. The night when Momay discovered the affair between Mr. Park and Arium, Onam was also in the room. Unlike Momay, who was devastated, Onam felt strangely happy, because he believed that Mo May finally saw Mr. Park and Arium. Onam was also in the room. Unlike Momai, who was devastated, Onam felt strangely happy, because he believed that Momai finally saw Mr. Park's true colors as a jerk who didn't deserve her. The next day, Onam was really sad when he saw Momai bringing a drunk Mr. Park to a motel for the night. This hurt Onam a lot, so he decided to email Momai, letting her know that he found out she was Mask Girl. One evening, Omi joined a chat with her loyal fans. She talked about feeling really down and wanting to give up. All her fans, including Onam, encouraged her. Then, unexpectedly, a fan named Handsome Monk asked Momai to meet up and go on a date. Onam seemed bothered by this. After a while, Momai agreed to meet Handsome to meet handsome monk however she intentionally wore glasses and a black mask to hide her face but eventually she gathered the courage to take off her mask and show her real face surprisingly handsome monk admired her real face and made momay feel at ease like she didn't need the mask anymore unfortunately it turned out that handsome monk was just playing with her feelings. He had made a bet with his friends and only wanted to have a physical encounter with Momai. In a different place, Onam was super angry when he read some posts from Handsome Monk, who had creepy intentions towards Momai. Onam was determined to rescue Momai from this shady guy. But sadly, Momai didn't pick up his calls because she didn't know him well. Meanwhile, Handsome Monk took Momai to a motel and tried to harass her. Momai fought back, but the guy got aggressive and hit her. Their struggle continued and Momai accidentally made Handsome Monk fall and hit his head on the sink. He passed out, leaving Momai in shock and panic. After a while, Momai read a worried message from Onam. He showed up soon after, as Momai called him for help. Onam told her to leave the room and that he would take responsibility for the situation. Just as Momai was about to do that, Handsome Monk suddenly woke up. Turns out he wasn't dead. This freaked Onam out, and he took drastic action. He ended up killing Handsome Monk, and tried to hide his body in a suitcase. The next day, Momi suddenly decides to quit her job without telling anyone, not even Song Soon. This really makes Onam sad and devastated. After that, she becomes unreachable on her phone. Onam then contacts the company's HR department to get Momi's address. He thinks about sending her some of her old stuff since she's no longer working.
Later that night, Onam goes to Momi's place.
However, her apartment looks deserted and empty.
When Onam gets back home, he's surprised to see that Masked Girl's account is live,
saying goodbye to her loyal fans.
She dances seductively and bids them farewell.

At the same time, Onam rushes back to Momi's apartment and convinces her to open the door. He steps inside her room and Momi tells him that she can't live with the guilt of a murder hanging over her. Momi then admitted that she knew Onam was the loyal fan named Handsome before. She felt really let down because Onam had been spying on her and causing her distress after discovering her secret identity. She saw Onam as just another guy who only cared about her looks and wanted her for her appearance. She couldn't believe Onam's feelings and laughed when he confessed his love. Momoi had decided to leave her past as Masked Girl behind and start Inu as a different person. Onam was disappointed with Momoi's choice since he didn't want her to erase him from her life. In a sudden turn of events, Onam pushed Momay onto the bed and expressed his love physically. But he was in for a shock when he saw Momay's face wrapped in bandages. She had undergone surgery. Momay quickly took charge and turned the tables on Onam, catching him off guard and eventually killing him that very night. The story shifts its focus to Onam's mom Kyungju. She's a single mom who left her husband because he had an affair and didn't support her during their three-year marriage. Kyungju is a really caring mom to her son. She's patient even as she watches Onam grow up as a quiet person who often comes home looking beat up, even though he never tells her what really happened. Kyungju works really hard and takes on any job to achieve her dream of opening a restaurant and supporting Onam. Cutting to the chase after Onam graduates from college and lands a job, he asks Kyungju to live close to his workplace. Kyungju initially hesitates since she wants to stay with Oh-nam, but she eventually agrees since Oh-nam has been living independently. However, this new arrangement strains their relationship. Whenever Kyung-ju visits Oh-nam, he's too caught up in his own busy life and doesn't seem interested in spending time with her. A few days later, Oh-nam stops answering Kyung-ju's calls, which worries her. She becomes anxious and contacts the police to check on Oh Nam. They enter Oh Nam's room and discover some strange things like a bad smell and a life-sized sex doll. But the real shot comes when they find a human body in his refrigerator. The news spreads, and people start thinking that Oh Nam might be a killer who escaped. After some time, Kyung Joo feels relieved when she learns that the body parts aren't Oh Nam's, but she can't believe that her son is being suspected of such horrifying things. Two detectives in charge of the case look into Oh Nam's workplace and find out that he recently visited HRD, asking for Mo Mi's address. They, along with Kyung Ju, investigate Mo Mi's old place and learn that she had plastic surgery before moving out. The detectives start thinking that Momae and Onam might have left together. But Kim Joo refuses to believe that her kind-hearted son could be involved in such terrible acts of perversion and murder. Kim Joo takes matters into her own hands and decides to investigate Kim Momae, who is suspected of being Onam's girlfriend. She enlists the help of a tech expert to unlock her son's computer, which has Momae's photo as the wallpaper. Even though she's not tech-savvy, Kyungju learns how to use a computer in her old age to find her son. She starts researching about Momae and is determined to understand complex investigations just to locate Onam. Kyungju is even ready to sell her restaurant and use her savings if it helps find Onam. Kyungju gets in touch with the leader of the Masked Girl fan community online, a person named Teddy. Teddy helps Kyungju, and they discover a woman who looks and dances like Momai, but with fake breasts. Teddy points out that not many people in South Korea have breasts like Momi's. At night, Kyungju misses Onam greatly and has nightmares about him. The next day, the police find Onam's mutilated body, which deeply saddens Kyungju. Following this gruesome discovery, the police start suspecting Momi in both cases of male mutilation. Meanwhile, Kyungju visits Momi's birth mother, hoping for some answers. However, Mo-mi's biological mother denies her and claims to have cut ties with Mo-mi long ago. Despite this, Kyung-ju keeps looking into the woman who resembles Mo-mi. She traces her to her workplace, only to find out that she's moved on to a new job through a distribution agency. Kyung-ju quietly observes the woman all the time, while having obtained an illegal gun for her revenge plan. She even becomes a part-time taxi driver to get closer to her target. Eventually, she waits outside the woman's workplace, and when she gets into Kyung-Joo's taxi, Kyung-Joo tries to engage her in conversation before using an electroshock device to knock her unconscious. Kyung-Joo takes the woman to an old building situated in a forest, making sure no one could hear of her even if she screamed. The woman pleads for her life, begging not to be killed. Driven by revenge, Kyungju points her rifle at the woman. She questions the woman about why Momai killed Oman, showing her a photo of the masked girl as evidence. Kyungju insists that the woman is the masked girl, pointing out the moon and star necklace as proof. When the woman sees the masked girl's photos, she bursts into laughter, aware of who the real masked girl is. She implores Kyungju not to kill her, promising to help her locate the genuine masked girl. The story shifts to Chundi, the woman caught by Kyung-ju, and not the real masked girl. Chun-hee has her own background. Back in her school days, she was different from her friends and had a crush on a classmate named Boo-young, who was about to debut as an idol. Chun-hee found Boo-young very charming, and when he and his friends tried to buy alcohol and cigarettes at a young age, they convinced her, as she was working at a convenience store. She got closer to Bu Young,
but he saw her as his source of money, not a true friend. Despite that, Chun-Hee's feelings
for Bu Young grew stronger, and she couldn't say no when he asked for help. Eventually,
Bu Young's true colors were revealed, and he discarded her after this debut. Feeling used
and hurt, Chun-Hee retaliated by exposing his past mistakes, leading to his agency dropping him.

Thank you for watching. were revealed, and he discarded her after this debut. Feeling used and hurt, Chun-Hee retaliated by exposing his past mistakes, leading to his agency dropping him. She decided to transform herself with her savings, aiming to become beautiful and sought after. Chun-Hee worked hard to make ends meet, even taking extra shifts. One day, Chun-Hee unexpectedly encounters Bu-Young again. But her desire for revenge fades when she sees that he's now homeless and struggling. Despite her past with Boo-Young, Chun-Hee takes him back into her life. Love can sometimes make people do foolish things, and that's what happens with Chun-Hee. Following this, Chun-Hee starts working at a club, becoming the prima donna. Soon, she crosses paths with Mo-Ma, a new singer introduced at the club. club moma's presence begins to attract more customers leaving chun he feeling jealous this jealousy leads to a fight between them over customers in the midst of their struggle momi's moon star necklace falls and is picked up by chun he after listening to chun he's story keongju decides to trust her and asks for her assistance in finding Mo-Mae. Kyung-Joo instructs Chun-Hee to share any information she has about Mo-Mae. After their conversation, Chun-Hee secretly heads to a rundown apartment. Unexpectedly, that rundown place is where Mo-Mae lives. Mo-Mae looks worn out and exhausted, while Chun-Hee appears deeply concerned about Mo-Mae's well-being. Despite their apparent conflict, Chun-hee and Mo-mi are actually close friends. Their bond started when they met at the club, sharing similar beauty and talent in singing and dancing. Chun-hee concocted a fabricated story to Kyung-ju, intending to shield Mo-mi from Kyung-ju's harmful intentions. Aware of Mo-mi's vulnerable situation, Chun-hee is determined to assist her in escaping her troubles. Mo-mi, being estranged from her mother, avoids returning home due to their strained relationship. However, an unexpected turn occurs when a high school student snaps a photo of Chun-hee leaving Mo-mi's place that day. Upon their return, Chun-hee and Bu-young engage in a heated argument, due to Chun-hee's increasing inability to tolerate him. She requests Bu-young to leave her house, but he refuses and resorts to violence. Bu-young, aware that Chun-hee had once posted damaging content about him, seeks to take responsibility for his circumstances. Despite the confrontation, he intentionally avoids hitting her face, as he still needs her to work for him. In a different place, it turns out the high school student who has been trailing Chun-Hee and Mo-Mae is none other than the leader of the Masked Girl fan club, known as Teddy. Mo-Mae is taken aback when someone recognizes her as Masked Girl. Upon reaching their destination, Mo-Mae grows concerned upon seeing Chun-Hee's state, prompting them to decide to stick together. Unfortunately, while Chun-Hee sneaks home to retrieve money and belongings, along with her pet dog, Bu-Young wakes up and assaults her mercilessly. Mo-Mei intervenes to save Chun-Hee from Bu-Young's brutality. As they faced a life-threatening situation, they make a tough choice to kill Bu-Young self-defense and protect themselves. They hide Boo Young's body in a suitcase and drive away. Unbeknownst to them, Kyung Joo has been observing their actions and realizes that Chun Hee and Mo Mai are collaborating to deceive her. Meanwhile, Teddy shares his latest findings about the masked girl, indicating that she has ties to Mo Mai and Chun Hee. During their journey their journey, Momay reveals to Chun-Yi that she is pregnant with the child conceived during her encounter with O-Mam. Despite any concerns about the child's appearance, Momay is determined to raise her baby with love and pride, valuing the child's inner beauty above all else. Momay didn't want to be a mom like her own mother, who never called her beautiful. That hurt has stayed with her until now.
When Momai and Chun-hee arrived at a river, planning to dispose of the suitcase with Bu-young's body, they were caught off guard as Kyung-ju suddenly appeared, shouting at them and aiming
a shotgun.
Chun-hee stepped in to shield Momai, claiming to be the masked girl Kyung-ju was after.
But Momai also went to protect Chun-hee, insisting she was the real Momai.
Kyungju was determined to harm them both, ignoring their explanations. A struggle broke out,
and Kyungju shot Chunhee in the stomach. Despite her wound, Chunhee fought fiercely against Kyungju's
attempt to harm Momai, eventually causing Kyungju to pass out. Momai was heartbroken as she held

Chunhee in her arms, mourning her friend's passing. Soon after, Mo-mi sank Kyung-ju's taxi into a river, with both Kyung-ju and Bu-young's bodies inside. After committing this act, she went into hiding and gave birth to her baby. Mo-mi entrusted her baby to her mother, Mo-ryeong, despite Mo-ryeong's initial reluctance. Mo-ryeong couldn't resist the innocence of the baby. And after a year of hiding, Moe Mai surrendered herself to the police. In 2012, she was sentenced to life in prison after confessing to all the crimes she had committed. Long story short, Moe Mai's daughter, named Kim Memo, grew up. Maimo's name was quite similar to her mother's. Just like her mom, Memo loved dressing dressing up, which often got her scolded by her grandmother, Mo-ryeong. As Man-mo started elementary school, some kids' parents forbade them from being friends with her because of her mom's past as the masked girl and a murderer. Innocent Man-mo began searching for information about the masked girl and her identity, copying funny things from the internet about her mom, unaware of her mother's actions. This behavior scared Moe Young, who would punish Memo despite her young age. One day, Memo stood up against a friend who was teasing her, resulting in her hitting the friend. Unfortunately, this led to Memo being expelled from school. Tearfully, she bid farewell to the kind grandmother, who sold to Pocky in front of the school. Long story short, Maimo changes schools a lot, but finally finds a new junior high where nobody knows her past. She feels at ease being quiet and keeping to herself. She befriends Yi Jun, another outcast, who eventually becomes her best friend. Despite starting off distant, they become really close. Yi Jun even lies about his family problems to ensure Maimo's support. One day, Memo opens up to Yi Jun about her convict mother, strengthening their bond. Yi Jun sticks by her side despite her tough life. He even suggests selling his belongings to help Memo and learns about Topaki's grandmother who always helped her and loved her. Memo also has an idea to borrow some money from the grandmother. The following day, Lee Jun sells his collection of idol photos to younger kids and faces bullying from his friends once again. He's tempted to reveal Memo's real mother to scare them, but he chooses not to. Meanwhile, Memo is caught stealing a laptop from a cafe, causing her grandmother Mo Young to feel angry and embarrassed. Memo, who has long felt disliked by Mo Young, decides to leave home. She plans to spend the night at Yi Jun's, but he makes up an excuse about his dad being angry. So, Man Mo ends up sleeping at school. The next day, Man Mo is bullied at school when her friends discover her connection to the masked girl. Feeling overwhelmed, she skips both school and going home. Yijun worries and searches for her. However, Memo secretly sees Yijun getting along well with her family. Memo feels betrayed, accusing Yijun of betraying her by sharing her secret. He denies it, which angers Memo even more, leading her to act rudely and eventually walk away from their friendship. Meanwhile, from a distance, Topaki's grandmother watches the fight between Minmo and Yi Jun with a strange sense of happiness. The story then jumps back to the year 2012, when Momi began her life sentence in prison. She finds a kind fellow prisoner who doesn't judge her for her past. Moreover, Momi becomes the focus of attention among other inmates due to her beauty and her willingness to give advice on plastic surgery. This earns her respect from some, but not from Onsik, a formidable inmate who dislikes her. Onsik sees Momi's beauty as a threat and even suspects her of being involved with her husband. Momai endures bullying from Onsik and her group. However, Momi doesn't back down and fights back Un-sik and her group, often ending up in solitary confinement. Yet, every time she's released, she continues to stand up to them. Eventually, Mun-sik seeks a truce to avoid further confrontations with Mo-mae. After spending 11 years in prison, Mo-mae's peaceful life is disrupted by a letter from Kyung-ju. She's anxious because Kyung-ju threatens to harm Mi-mo, her daughter. To safeguard Mi-mo, Mo-mi decides to escape from prison, even though it's a challenging task. She plans her escape by crafting a rope from the cloth she uses for sewing every day. Her cellmate helps by distracting the guards, allowing Mo-mi to sneak away unnoticed. Unfortunately, her escape attempt goes awry when the rope she's using to scale the wall tears suddenly. The guards catch her in the act. Once the guards discovered Momai's escape attempt, the religious chief warden took action. Momai was put in isolation for over a month. Along with this, the chief warden gave her a Bible, hoping she'd reflect on her actions and find redemption. During her time in solitary confinement with the Bible, Momay underwent a surprising transformation. She became deeply religious. In a turn of events, Momay found herself agreeing to be a kidney donor for Princess Munsik. This act of generosity earned Momay Munsik's immense gratitude. The princess pledged to support Momay and fulfill her wishes in return. On a regular day at the prison, they organized self-improvement training with volunteers from the outside. This event led to Momae and Kyungju crossing paths again. At first, Momae didn't recognize Kyungju due to her changed appearance from plastic surgery, done as part of her revenge against Momae. Kyungju recounted that Momae survived her suicide attempt and expressed how her thirst for revenge grew even stronger after that. With a new face and the knowledge that Momai was in prison, Kyungju devised a plan to get close to Momi's daughter, Memo, who lived with Moe Young. Kyungju approached little Memo and portrayed herself as kind and caring. She played the role of a loving grandmother
in Maimo's eyes. However, behind this facade, Kyungju secretly revealed Maimo's mother's past
to the mothers of Maimo's friends, causing Maimo to be ostracized. She continued this manipulation
when Maimo changed schools, making sure Maimo was bullied once more. After hearing Kyungju's stories,
Maimo became emotional and tried to talk to her. But Kyungju faked an attack from Momai,

We'll be right back. Maimo was bullied once more. After hearing Kumju's stories, Memo became emotional and tried to talk to her. But Kumju faked an attack for Momai, leading to Momai being punished again with solitary confinement. Leaving the prison, Kumju felt a sense of satisfaction, believing she had taken her revenge. Unbeknownst to Momai, Kumju had been looking after Memo like a granddaughter in a secluded mountain house. Despite her initial intentions to kidnap her, Kyungju discovered that Memo preferred to live with her, seeing her as a grandmother figure. Memo made the bold choice to say farewell to her biological grandmother, Moe Young, and turn off her phone, leaving Moe Young worried and reporting Maemo's disappearance to the police. On another side of the story, Won-sik's assistance to Mo Mai is nothing more than a ruse. She's only interested in Mo Mi, as a potential kidney donor for her daughter. Won-sik even went as far as creating a fake photo of Memo, handing it to Mo Mai to keep her from worrying. Mo Mai, deeply concerned for her daughter, approached Won-sik to gather information about both her daughter and mother. Wonseok managed to obtain Momae's mother's contact number, leading Momae to make immediate contact. Sadly, her mother was still unwilling to share any details about Memo. Meanwhile, Kyungju was preparing to exact revenge on Memo by causing her harm. However, the very night, Kim Ju's stance softened a bit when Memo surprised her with a birthday celebration. Back in prison, Momae found it impossible to sleep that night. Her motherly instincts told her that Memo might be in danger. The following day, Momae was scheduled for a kidney donor surgery at the hospital. Seeing an opportunity as the police's guard lowered, Mo Mai wasted no time in attempting an escape. Driven by desperation and determination to find Memo, Mo Mai jumped from a second-floor window and managed to flee. She then commandeered a patient's car parked in front of the hospital. In different place, Kyung Joo cleverly slips sleeping pills into Memo's food. Oblivious to any suspicion, Memo happily gobbles up the meal. Memo is even excited about the prospect of finding a job soon, so she can buy nice things for Kyungju as a gesture of kindness. Meanwhile, Moyoung becomes increasingly suspicious about the saleswoman of the teppoki Maemo mentioned and the call she received from her. She takes it upon herself to track down the address of this Topoki seller's grandmother. Upon obtaining the address, Mo Young rushes to the location in haste. Surprisingly, Yi Jun also arrives, driven by concern for Ma Mo. Yi Jun has already figured out that the Topoki seller's grandmother, also known as Kum Ju, is the one who spread rumors about Ma Mo and the masked girl among her friends. While on her way to Kyungju's address,
Mo Young receives a call from Mo Mai,
who informs her about Kyungju's revenge plot against them.
Upon hearing this, Mo Mai shares Kyungju's address with Mo Young and both hurry to the scene.
However, Mo Young eventually decides to leave Yi Jun on the side of the road,
fearing for her safety.
Unexpectedly, Yi Jun summons the courage to continue searching for Maimo
with the money she has.

Thanks for watching! to leave Yi Jun on the side of the road, fearing for her safety. Unexpectedly, Yi Jun summons the courage to continue searching for Mai Mo with the money she has. In a different place, Mo Mi's car suddenly breaks down due to running out of gas. She attempts to hitch a ride from passing vehicles until a kind woman offers her a lift. The woman sympathizes with Mo Mai, who confesses about the abuse she faced from her husband. However, during the ride, a radio broadcast discusses the escape of a prisoner known as the Mask Girl. The woman driving becomes fearful, causing Mo Med to request to be dropped off in the middle of the road. Mo Mei continues her journey on foot from there. Meanwhile, Kyung Joo, who is holding Memo, encounters a small problem as she struggles with operating the newly purchased camcorder. She plans to show moment footage of Mimo's suffering later. Memo, who wakes up during this time, pleads with Kyungju to let her go. Unbeknownst to Memo, Kyungju harbors intense hatred towards her. Despite Mimo feeling cold, Kyungju tucks her in. Kyungju becomes puzzled when the doorbell rings unexpectedly. To her surprise, a police officer arrives, looking for a middle school boy who has reportedly been held captive based on a tip. After a thorough search of Kyung-Joo's house, the police find nothing and depart. The police officer hears a strange noise from inside the house, but receives an emergency call from the station instructing all officers to search for the masked girl. As the police officer leaves, Kyung-Joo resumes her revenge plan and attempts to kill Ma-Mo by burning mosquito coils to cause poisoning. Fortunately, Mo-Young arrives just in time and bravely tries to rescue Ma-Mo. She fiercely confronts Kyung-Joo and puts up a strong fight. Soon after, Yi-joon also joins in to save Maimo. Inside the tunnel where Maimo is being held captive, Yi-joon apologizes to Maimo and sets her free. Meanwhile, up in the tunnel, Mo-young sustains multiple stab wounds while protecting Maimo from Kyung-joo. Shortly, Mo-ma arrives and surprises Kyung-joo with a hit from behind. Mo- Mo Young instructs Mo Mai to check on Mai Mo's condition in the tunnel.
Mo Mai enters the tunnel to rescue Min Mo and Yi Jun, but Kyung Ju regains consciousness
and confronts them with a gun.
Mo Mai manages to disarm Kyung Ju and urges Min Mo and Yi Jun to escape.

Once they are outside the tunnel, Min Mo feels a heavy sense of sadness and guilt as she witnesses Momyeong's severe injuries and eventual passing. Inside the tunnel, the confrontation between Momae and Kyungju reaches its climax, resulting in Momae's victory as Kyungju faints once again after their intense duel. Momae leads Memo and Heejun out of the tunnel. However, their escape is interrupted as several policemen surround the area and demand Momae's surrender. Unexpectedly, Kumju re-emerges, aiming a shotgun at Momae and Memo. Just then, the police take action and shoot Kumju in the head after he shoots Momae in the back. Kumju dies instantly in front of his own house. Meanwhile, Mo Mi is taken into custody by the police.
The story wraps up by revealing Maimo's current life on her own.
Thankfully, Hee Joon's parents step in to become Maimo's guardians.
As time passes, Maimo starts to lead a peaceful life.
Whenever she's longing for her mom, she watches her mom's childhood videos.
Maimo takes great pride in her mom's strong self-assurance and impressive talents,
despite not fitting society's standards of beauty.
